hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】摩根大通的杰米戴蒙发出模糊的信贷衰退警告，但债券市场有更紧迫的问题；【WORLD】伊朗战争以令人惊讶的方式增强了乌克兰的实力。与俄罗斯的停火能否更接近？；【CRYPTO】加密货币行业支持《清晰法案》收益率妥协，推动参议院银行业加价。

items.title: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon issued vague credit recession warning, but the bond market has more pressing issues
items.summary: As fears about a credit crisis rise, bond investors may be too complacent with Kevin Warsh to become next Fed chair and volatility in rates likely to follow.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通的杰米戴蒙发出模糊的信贷衰退警告，但债券市场有更紧迫的问题
items.summary_zh: 随着对信贷危机的担忧加剧，债券投资者可能对凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)成为下一任美联储主席过于自满，利率可能随之波动。

items.title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
items.summary: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争以令人惊讶的方式增强了乌克兰的实力。与俄罗斯的停火能否更接近？
items.summary_zh: 泽连斯基总统一直在访问海湾地区，以展示该国的军事智慧。

items.title: Crypto industry backs CLARITY Act yield compromise, pushes Senate Banking for markup
items.summary: The agreement necessitates firms restructure reward programs from a "buy and hold" to a "buy and use" model; however, CCI raised concerns over its broad prohibition.
items.title_zh: 加密货币行业支持《清晰法案》收益率妥协，推动参议院银行业加价
items.summary_zh: 该协议要求公司将奖励计划从“购买并持有”模式重组为“购买并使用”模式；然而，CCI 对其广泛的禁令表示担忧。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin’s April price surge was ‘speculative’ as spot demand remains weak, warns of correction risk
items.summary: Bitcoin's price rose about 20% in April, but the rally was driven by speculative perpetual futures demand while spot demand remained weak, CryptoQuant said.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示，由于现货需求依然疲弱，比特币四月份价格飙升是“投机性”，并警告调整风险
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，4 月份比特币价格上涨了约 20%，但上涨是由投机性永续期货需求推动的，而现货需求仍然疲软。

items.title: China’s self-driving truck leaders say AI breakthroughs won’t accelerate rollout — here’s why
items.summary: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.
items.title_zh: 中国自动驾驶卡车领导者表示人工智能突破不会加速推广——原因如下
items.summary_zh: 中国行业高管表示，人工智能编码和聊天机器人的快速进步并没有改变自动驾驶汽车上路的时间表。

items.title: Morgan Stanley's Oldenburg: Bitcoin on U.S. bank balance sheets is coming, just not yet
items.summary: Morgan Stanley launched the first bank-issued Bitcoin ETP, but Amy Oldenburg said advisors, regulators and balance sheets still have a long way to go.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利奥尔登堡：美国银行资产负债表上的比特币即将到来，只是还没有
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利推出了首个银行发行的比特币 ETP，但艾米·奥尔登堡 (Amy Oldenburg) 表示，顾问、监管机构和资产负债表仍有很长的路要走。

items.title: Americans still prefer banks over crypto for financial access, CoinDesk's survey shows
items.summary: New polling of voters suggests they aren't yet warming much to crypto, tending to see it as a negative force in the economy, and they have similar distrust of AI.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 的调查显示，美国人仍然更喜欢银行而不是加密货币来获取金融服务
items.summary_zh: 新的选民民意调查显示，他们对加密货币的热情还没有太高，倾向于将其视为经济中的负面力量，而且他们对人工智能也有类似的不信任。

items.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
items.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 在 FedRAMP 中可用
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 可通过 FedRAMP 对 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 OpenAI API 进行中等授权，从而为美国联邦机构提供安全的 AI 采用。

items.title: Bitcoin's 'hazardous' airdrop: Why developers are warning against Paul Sztorc’s eCash fork
items.summary: Developers and industry figures say the eCash proposal introduces user risk, uneven distribution and philosophical tension.
items.title_zh: 比特币的“危险”空投：为什么开发者警告 Paul Sztorc 的 eCash 分叉
items.summary_zh: 开发商和行业人士表示，eCash 提案带来了用户风险、分配不均和哲学张力。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation’s recent ETH sales to Tom Lee’s Bitmine hit $47 million after latest deal
items.summary: EF said the funds will go towards operations, activities, protocol R&D, ecosystem development, community grant funding and more.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会最近向 Tom Lee 的 Bitmine 出售的 ETH 在最新交易后达到了 4700 万美元
items.summary_zh: EF 表示，这些资金将用于运营、活动、协议研发、生态系统开发、社区拨款等。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Greg Abel earns solid scorecard from Berkshire shareholders after first annual meeting
items.summary: The reviews from longtime shareholders and professional investors were broadly positive, even as many acknowledged the notable absence of Warren Buffett.
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔在第一次年度会议后从伯克希尔股东那里获得了良好的记分卡
items.summary_zh: 长期股东和专业投资者的评价总体上是积极的，尽管许多人承认沃伦·巴菲特明显缺席。

items.title: U.S. oil prices will exceed Iran wartime high to above $125 as conflict drags on, Kalshi traders say
items.summary: The April 7 high of $113 in Western Texas Intermediate crude futures will likely be broken, traders on the prediction markets platform think.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，随着冲突持续下去，美国油价将超过伊朗战时高点，达到 125 美元以上
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，西德克萨斯中质原油期货 4 月 7 日高点 113 美元可能会被打破。

items.title: China’s EV price war turns into AI arms race beyond cheaper cars
items.summary: Chinese EV firms are rapidly rolling out in-car AI features to gain an edge, but as the price war drags on, those technologies are quickly becoming commoditized.
items.title_zh: 中国的电动汽车价格战变成了超越廉价汽车的人工智能军备竞赛
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司正在迅速推出车载人工智能功能以获得优势，但随着价格战的持续，这些技术正在迅速商品化。

items.title: Apple execs to talk China and tariffs, but will avoid discussing foldable iPhone, per traders on Kalshi
items.summary: Apple is set to report earnings after the bell on Thursday, with its conference call scheduled for 5:00 pm ET.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员表示，苹果高管将讨论中国和关税问题，但将避免讨论可折叠 iPhone
items.summary_zh: 苹果定于周四盘后公布财报，电话会议定于美国东部时间下午 5:00 举行。

items.title: How A.I. Is Transforming China’s Entertainment Industry
items.summary: A.I.-generated microdramas have taken off. Celebrities have threatened legal action against the use of their likeness, while actors say jobs have dried up.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何正在改变中国的娱乐产业
items.summary_zh: 人工智能制作的微剧已经开始流行。名人威胁要对使用他们肖像的行为采取法律行动，而演员则表示工作岗位已经枯竭。

items.title: ‘Wartime Relic’ Explodes Under Campfire in Austria, Injuring Five Children
items.summary: The children, aged 10 to 14, were taken to a hospital for treatment after the explosion in Upper Austria, the police said.
items.title_zh: “战时遗物”在奥地利篝火下爆炸，导致五名儿童受伤
items.summary_zh: 警方称，上奥地利州发生爆炸后，这些 10 至 14 岁的儿童被送往医院接受治疗。

items.title: The Insurgency Threatening to Derail a U.S.-Pakistan Pact
items.summary: Attacks by the Baloch Liberation Army could derail Pakistan’s plans for a billion-dollar mining deal with the Trump administration.
items.title_zh: 叛乱分子威胁破坏美巴协议
items.summary_zh: 俾路支解放军的袭击可能会破坏巴基斯坦与特朗普政府达成的价值十亿美元的采矿协议的计划。

items.title: Oil Tanker Hijacking Stokes Fear of Links Between Houthi Rebels and Somali Pirates
items.summary: The location and timing of the attack fueled concerns about collaboration between Somali pirates and the Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen under the cover of Mideast turmoil.
items.title_zh: 油轮劫持引发人们对胡塞叛军与索马里海盗之间联系的担忧
items.summary_zh: 袭击的地点和时间引发了人们对索马里海盗与伊朗支持的也门胡塞武装在中东动荡的掩护下合作的担忧。

items.title: U.S. voters don't trust Trump administration to oversee crypto sector, CoinDesk poll finds
items.summary: The new poll suggests the vast majority of people think that government officials should keep their own financial interests separate from the industry.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 民意调查发现，美国选民不信任特朗普政府监管加密货币行业
items.summary_zh: 新的民意调查显示，绝大多数人认为政府官员应该将自己的经济利益与行业分开。

items.title: Brazil's central bank bans stablecoin and crypto settlement in cross-border payments
items.summary: The ban applies to fintechs and payment firms, closing the back-end payment rail for cross-border flows, but individual crypto investors can still buy and hold assets.
items.title_zh: 巴西央行禁止跨境支付中的稳定币和加密货币结算
items.summary_zh: 该禁令适用于金融科技和支付公司，关闭了跨境流动的后端支付通道，但个人加密货币投资者仍然可以购买和持有资产。

items.title: The $292M crypto hack exposed DeFi's weak spots. Here’s what must change, insiders say
items.summary: As Wall Street moves onchain, the year's biggest crypto hack and DeFi crisis is forcing a rethink of risk, security and market structure, industry insiders told CoinDesk.
items.title_zh: 价值 2.92 亿美元的加密货币黑客事件暴露了 DeFi 的弱点。内部人士表示，以下是必须改变的事情
items.summary_zh: 业内人士告诉 CoinDesk，随着华尔街转向链上，今年最大的加密货币黑客攻击和 DeFi 危机正在迫使人们重新思考风险、安全和市场结构。

items.title: North Korea terrorism creditors move to seize Arbitrum-frozen Kelp DAO ETH ahead of DeFi United vote
items.summary: The plaintiffs are not Kelp DAO hack victims but families holding three unsatisfied terrorism judgments against North Korea looking to collect on debts.
items.title_zh: 朝鲜恐怖主义债权人在 DeFi United 投票前采取行动扣押 Arbitrum 冻结的 Kelp DAO ETH
items.summary_zh: 原告不是 Kelp DAO 黑客攻击的受害者，而是持有三项针对朝鲜的恐怖主义判决并寻求追债的家庭。

items.title: Coinbase says deal reached on Clarity Act stablecoin yield, clearing path to long-stalled Senate markup
items.summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong urged the Senate Banking Committee to "mark it up" as a months-long stalemate appears to be at an end.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 表示就《澄清法案》稳定币收益率达成协议，为长期停滞的参议院加价扫清道路
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 首席执行官布莱恩·阿姆斯特朗 (Brian Armstrong) 敦促参议院银行委员会“标记这一点”，因为长达数月的僵局似乎已经结束。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #192.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 192。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #901.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Gigachad (GIGA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#901。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享了 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 04/29/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Wednesday, 04/29/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selecting TAA Strategies Based on Recent Performance (Part 1) [Allocate Smartly] This is the first of a multipart series
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 4 月 29 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 4 月 29 日星期三 Quantocracy 最近推荐的链接摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！根据近期表现选择 TAA 策略（第 1 部分）[智能分配] 这是多部分系列的第一篇

items.title: Where the goblins came from
items.summary: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.
items.title_zh: 哥布林从哪里来
items.summary_zh: goblin 输出如何在 AI 模型中传播：时间线、根本原因以及 GPT-5 行为中个性驱动的怪癖背后的修复。

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.
items.title_zh: 我们对社区安全的承诺
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何通过模型保障、误用检测、策略执行以及与安全专家的协作来保护 ChatGPT 中的社区安全。

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型、Codex 和托管代理来到 AWS
items.summary_zh: OpenAI GPT 模型、Codex 和托管代理现已在 AWS 上提供，使企业能够在其 AWS 环境中构建安全的 AI。

items.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
items.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.
items.title_zh: Microsoft OpenAI 合作伙伴关系的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和微软宣布了一项修订后的协议，该协议简​​化了合作伙伴关系，增加了长期清晰度，并支持大规模的持续人工智能创新。

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金变得越来越紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: Cautious optimism: Berkshire investors weigh future under new CEO Greg Abel
items.summary: The mood in the air was cautiously optimistic as new and returning investors weighed the company's direction under a new chief executive.
items.title_zh: 谨慎乐观：伯克希尔投资者在新任首席执行官格雷格·阿贝尔的领导下权衡未来
items.summary_zh: 随着新投资者和回归投资者权衡新任首席执行官领导下的公司发展方向，空气中弥漫着谨慎乐观的情绪。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s shopping extravaganza draws lighter crowds as spotlight shifts to Greg Abel
items.summary: Greg Abel made a point of stopping by every booth in the hall, greeting employees and shaking hands with shareholders.
items.title_zh: 随着聚光灯转向格雷格·阿贝尔，伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司的购物盛宴吸引了较少的人群
items.summary_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔特意在大厅的每个展位前停下来，向员工致意并与股东握手。

items.title: Six months out, control of the Senate is a dead heat, traders on Kalshi say
items.summary: While Democrats are favored to flip control of the House of Representatives, the upper chamber is a much closer race, traders believe.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员表示，六个月后，参议院的控制权势均力敌
items.summary_zh: 交易员认为，虽然民主党人倾向于扭转众议院的控制权，但上议院的竞争要激烈得多。

items.title: Berkshire shares struggle into annual meeting. Can Abel rekindle enthusiasm without Buffett center stage?
items.summary: For the first time, the 95-year-old Buffett won't be the central figure on stage, marking a new era for one of investing's most closely watched rituals.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔股票在年会上陷入困境。如果没有巴菲特的关注，阿贝尔能否重燃热情？
items.summary_zh: 95 岁的巴菲特将首次不再成为舞台上的中心人物，这标志着最受关注的投资仪式之一进入了新时代。

items.title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
items.summary: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.
items.title_zh: 伊朗称美国已对其最新和平提议做出回应
items.summary_zh: 美国尚未正式确认已做出回应。然而，据报道，特朗普告诉以色列坎新闻，这是不可接受的。

items.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.summary: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.
items.title_zh: 大西洋游轮疑似病毒爆发 三人死亡
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织表示，已确认一例汉坦病毒感染病例，另有五例疑似病例正在调查中。

items.title: Russian strikes kill 10 as Zelensky says Ukraine hits oil tankers and terminal
items.summary: Fatalities have been reported around Ukraine as Kyiv says Russian "shadow fleet" tankers were hit by drones.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基称乌克兰袭击油轮和码头，俄罗斯空袭造成10人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据基辅称，俄罗斯“影子舰队”油轮遭到无人机袭击，乌克兰各地已报告有人死亡。

items.title: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
items.summary: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚就其国民遇袭事件召见南非特使
items.summary_zh: 南非爆发了一波反移民抗议浪潮，其中一些抗议活动演变为暴力活动。

items.title: Police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
items.summary: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.
items.title_zh: 警察跳入鳄鱼出没的河流中打捞人类遗骸
items.summary_zh: 警方怀疑这些遗骸属于上周被洪水冲走的一名商人。

items.title: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
items.summary: Sahand tells the BBC World Service he sends satellite internet terminals into Iran to help show "the real picture".
items.title_zh: 秘密网络将星链技术走私到伊朗以应对互联网中断
items.summary_zh: 萨汉德告诉英国广播公司国际台，他向伊朗发送卫星互联网终端，以帮助展示“真实情况”。

items.title: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
items.summary: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees said withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.
items.title_zh: 两位美国共和党高层表示，德国削减驻军向俄罗斯发出了错误信号
items.summary_zh: 众议院和参议院军事委员会主席表示，撤回 5000 名军人可能会削弱威慑力。

items.title: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as brother fears she is dying
items.summary: Her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.
items.title_zh: 对被监禁的伊朗诺贝尔奖得主的担忧，因为哥哥担心她快要死了
items.summary_zh: 她的家人表示，54 岁的她的健康状况急剧恶化，已被从监狱送往当地医院。

items.title: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco, officials say
items.summary: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, who are believed to have been involved in an accident, according to authorities.
items.title_zh: 官员称，两名美国军人在摩洛哥失踪
items.summary_zh: 据当局称，对据信卷入事故的军人的搜救行动正在进行中。

items.title: Global Demand for Rare Earth Minerals Is Intensifying Criminal Threats in the Amazon Rainforest
items.summary: Global demand for critical minerals, used to build drones and electric cars, is surging, setting of a new wave of criminality in the world’s largest rainforest.
items.title_zh: 全球对稀土矿物的需求正在加剧亚马逊雨林的犯罪威胁
items.summary_zh: 全球对用于制造无人机和电动汽车的关键矿物的需求正在激增，在世界上最大的雨林中掀起了新一波的犯罪浪潮。

items.title: Crack Down? Close Ranks? U.S. Cartel Case Puts Mexican Leaders on the Spot.
items.summary: The indictment of a Mexican governor has spotlighted corruption, strained cross-border relations and handed President Claudia Sheinbaum a thorny choice.
items.title_zh: 镇压？紧密的队伍？美国卡特尔案让墨西哥领导人陷入困境。
items.summary_zh: 对墨西哥州长的起诉凸显了腐败、跨境关系紧张，并给总统克劳迪娅·希因鲍姆带来了一个棘手的选择。

items.title: What to Know About Elections in West Bengal and Other Indian States
items.summary: Vote counting starts on Monday after over 154 million people participated in elections for state legislatures last month. The contests can tilt the balance of power for the whole country.
items.title_zh: 关于西孟加拉邦和其他印度邦的选举需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 上个月有超过 1.54 亿人参加了州立法机构选举，计票工作于周一开始。这些竞争可以倾斜整个国家的力量平衡。

items.title: A Perilous Train Ride Home in Pakistan on the Jaffer Express
items.summary: We witnessed crossfire while waiting for the Jaffer Express, a vital lifeline through Balochistan. For many, it’s the only way home.
items.title_zh: 乘坐贾弗特快列车在巴基斯坦的危险旅程中回家
items.summary_zh: 我们在等待贾弗快车时亲眼目睹了交火，贾弗快车是穿越俾路支省的重要生命线。对于许多人来说，这是回家的唯一途径。

items.title: Norway’s Northern Lights Nightmare
items.summary: This Arctic region has seen a boom in tourism, but as tourists chase the northern lights, scammers chase their money.
items.title_zh: 挪威的北极光噩梦
items.summary_zh: 这个北极地区的旅游业蓬勃发展，但当游客追逐北极光时，骗子们也在追逐他们的金钱。

items.title: How Germany May Have Misjudged Trump’s Anger on Iran
items.summary: Germany had appeared not to believe President Trump’s threats to pull troops from the country. Once it was announced, Berlin offered a measured response.
items.title_zh: 德国如何误判了特朗普对伊朗的愤怒
items.summary_zh: 德国似乎不相信特朗普总统从该国撤军的威胁。消息一经宣布，柏林就做出了谨慎的回应。

items.title: Policy Summit and other things at Consensus 2026: State of Crypto
items.summary: We are kicking off the show in Miami this week. Here's what you should attend.
items.title_zh: 2026 年共识政策峰会和其他活动：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 我们本周将在迈阿密拉开演出。这是您应该参加的活动。

items.title: Crypto is at bottom of U.S. voters' priorities heading into elections, CoinDesk survey shows
items.summary: Americans had a generally unfavorable view of cryptocurrencies, the survey of 1,000 randomly selected registered voters found.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 调查显示，加密货币在美国选民的选举优先事项中排名垫底
items.summary_zh: 对 1,000 名随机选择的登记选民进行的调查发现，美国人普遍对加密货币持负面看法。

items.title: Mike Cagney’s second act: Turning blockchain into Wall Street’s new plumbing
items.summary: Figure’s $1 billion month capped a years-long push to strip out middlemen from credit markets, bringing real-world assets, lending and even equities onchain.
items.title_zh: 迈克·卡格尼的第二幕：将区块链变成华尔街的新管道
items.summary_zh: Figure 每月 10 亿美元的收入为多年来将中间商从信贷市场中剔除、将现实世界的资产、贷款甚至股票带入链上的努力画上了句号。

items.title: New York AG settles for $5 million with Uphold in first enforcement action against a crypto yield product promoter
items.summary: The settlement is the first New York enforcement action to target a platform that promoted someone else's crypto yield product rather than its own issuer.
items.title_zh: New York AG 在针对加密收益产品推广者的首次执法行动中与 Uphold 达成 500 万美元和解
items.summary_zh: 该和解协议是纽约首个针对推广他人加密收益产品而非其发行人的平台的执法行动。

items.title: BlackRock urges OCC to drop tokenized reserve cap idea, expand eligible assets in GENIUS Act comment letter
items.summary: The world's largest asset manager opposed a potential 20% cap on tokenized reserve assets, a constraint that would limit products like its BUIDL fund.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德敦促 OCC 放弃代币化储备上限想法，在 GENIUS 法案评论信中扩大合格资产
items.summary_zh: 这家全球最大的资产管理公司反对对代币化储备资产设定 20% 的上限，这一限制将限制其 BUIDL 基金等产品。

items.title: Leading Iranian crypto exchange Nobitex was founded by sons of elite political family tied to supreme leaders: Reuters
items.summary: Reuters found that hundreds of millions of dollars in transactions tied to sanctioned Iranian state entities have moved through Nobitex since 2018.
items.title_zh: 伊朗领先的加密货币交易所 Nobitex 由与最高领导人有联系的精英政治家族的儿子创立：路透社
items.summary_zh: 路透社发现，自 2018 年以来，与受制裁的伊朗国家实体相关的数亿美元交易已通过 Nobitex 进行。

items.title: A16z backs CFTC, says state-by-state rules on prediction markets create ‘barrier to impartial access’
items.summary: Venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz argued that state prediction market restrictions could drain liquidity and limit market access.
items.title_zh: A16z 支持 CFTC，称预测市场的各州规则造成了“公正准入的障碍”
items.summary_zh: 风险投资公司 Andreessen Horowitz 认为，国家预测市场限制可能会耗尽流动性并限制市场准入。

items.title: JPMorgan says rising stablecoin use may not lead to similar market cap growth
items.summary: Stablecoin transaction volume is rising fast, but higher velocity may limit how much total market cap grows, JPMorgan analysts said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，稳定币使用量的增加可能不会带来类似的市值增长
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师表示，稳定币交易量正在快速增长，但较高的交易速度可能会限制总市值的增长。

items.title: Polymarket and Kalshi’s combined lifetime volumes hit $150 billion in April
items.summary: Polymarket and Kalshi remain the leading betting markets in a sector that is beginning to gain widespread attention and scrutiny.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 和 Kalshi 4 月份的总销售额达到 1500 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 和 Kalshi 仍然是该行业的领先博彩市场，该行业已开始受到广泛关注和审查。

items.title: Introducing Advanced Account Security
items.summary: Introducing Advanced Account Security: phishing-resistant login, stronger recovery, and enhanced protections to safeguard sensitive data and prevent account takeover.
items.title_zh: 引入高级帐户安全
items.summary_zh: 引入高级帐户安全性：防网络钓鱼登录、更强的恢复以及增强的保护措施，以保护敏感数据并防止帐户被盗用。

items.title: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI scales Stargate to build the compute infrastructure powering AGI, adding new data center capacity to meet growing AI demand.
items.title_zh: 构建智能时代的计算基础设施
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展 Stargate 以构建支持 AGI 的计算基础设施，增加新的数据中心容量以满足不断增长的 AI 需求。

items.title: Cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a five-part action plan for strengthening cybersecurity in the Intelligence Age, focused on democratizing AI-powered cyber defense and protecting critical systems.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的网络安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了一个由五部分组成的行动计划，旨在加强智能时代的网络安全，重点是实现人工智能驱动的网络防御的民主化和保护关键系统。

items.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
items.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.
items.title_zh: 编排的开源规范：Symphony
items.summary_zh: 了解 Symphony（Codex 编排的开源规范）如何将问题跟踪器转变为始终在线的代理系统，从而提高工程输出并减少上下文切换。

items.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
items.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.
items.title_zh: Choco 通过 AI 代理实现食品配送自动化
items.summary_zh: Choco 如何使用 OpenAI API 简化食品配送、提高生产力并实现增长——关于真实世界人工智能影响的深入客户故事。

items.title: AI evals are becoming the new compute bottleneck
items.title_zh: 人工智能评估正在成为新的计算瓶颈

items.title: How to build scalable web apps with OpenAI's Privacy Filter
items.title_zh: 如何使用 OpenAI 的隐私过滤器构建可扩展的 Web 应用程序

items.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4：代理可以实际使用的百万令牌上下文

items.summary: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌将重新推出 Kaggle 为期 5 天的人工智能代理强化课程，现已开放报名。

items.title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
items.summary: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
items.title_zh: 双子座整理空间（和生活）的 8 个技巧
items.summary_zh: 与 Gemini 一起整理您的家庭和数字空间。使用人工智能驱动的技巧来制定清洁计划、整理收件箱、处理季节性家务。

items.title: Here’s how our TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads.

items.title: Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
items.summary: Google has been a proud part of Austria’s landscape for years, and today, we’re announcing our first data center in Kronstorf, generating 100 direct jobs. This facility …

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
